name: Capybara Winter Curse
description: During the winter months, the entire capybara folk fell ill and was cursed. Hit all the zombie capybaras with your snowball gun and neutralize them. Remember, the giant capybara zombie is extremely powerful; you must be very fast and strong to defeat it. The fate of the entire capybara world is in your hands. Grab your weapon and start firing!
instructions: Click the mouse to fire or tap the fire button on mobile Use the WASD keys to move Mobile touch controls available Playable on both mobile and PC
